titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 58: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 58. (A.R. No. 249 of 1926.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the maṇḍapa right of entrance, Vaṭamūlēśvara temple.

This inscription records the apportionment of land in Śembudaṟkuḍi alias Tiruvālanduṟai purchased and endowed by the Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar chief Maṟavaṉ Kaṇḍaṉār for God Mahādēvar of Tiruvālanduṟai in Śiṟu-paḻuvūr. The shares allotted were as follows.

a. One share to Paśuvati Nagarattāṉ alias Karuviḍai Peruṅkuśavaṉ, the potter (vēṭkōvaṉ) of Paḻuvūr, Ūraṉāchchaṉ, Muṇḍaṉ Nagarattāṉ and Nīlaṉ Kallarai-for supplying three pots (kuḍuvai), three mud vessels and any such items required by the temple per day.
b. One share for the brāhmaṇa conducting the worship.
c. Four shares for two persons watering the temple garden.
d. Two shares for the persons blowing two trumpets (kāḷam)
e. Two shares for burning a perpetual lamp for god in Maṟavaṉ Īśvaram.
f. One share for arranging the cleaning of the temple premises.
g. Four shares for the persons providing flowers and for those who recite tiruppadiyam.
h. One share for sprinkling water and cleaning the courtyard and outerpremises of the temple.
i. One share for writing accounts.
j. One share for a person administering the temple (śrīkāriyam ārāivār).
The first 45 lines are published in S.I.I. Vol. XIX No. 238.
The remaining lines no. 46-55 are published in the journal Varalāṟu Vol. V p. 14.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesari
paṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 9- Ā
vatu ciṟupaḻuvūr tiruvāla
ntuṟai mahādevarkku paḻu
veṭṭarayar maṟavaṉ kaṇṭanār
vilaikku koṇṭu kuṭutta ce
mputaṟkuṭiyāṉa tiruvālantu
ṟainallūr nivantam cey
tapaṭiyāvatu paḻuvur veṭ
kkovaṉ pacuvati nakarattā
ṉāṉa karuviṭai peruṅkucava
ṉukkum Ūrāṉāccaṉukkum
muṇṭaṉ nakarattāṉukkum
nilaṉ kallaṟaikkum
nicatam muṉṟu kuṭuvai
yum nicatam muṉṟu caṭṭi
yum maṟṟu
m veṇṭum
kalamum Iṭa
kkuṭutta pa
ṅkoṉṟu
m Ārāti
ṉai ceyyum
pirāmaṇa
ṉukku paṅku
1- ṟum na
ntavāṉa
miṟaip
pār Iruva
rkku paṅku
nālum
kāḷam Ira
ṇṭiṉukku
paṅkiraṇ
ṭum maṟava
ṉṉiccuvara
ttu tevarkku
nontā
viḷakku E
rikka paṅku
Iraṇṭu tiru
meḻukku pa
ṅku Oṉṟu
tiruppaḷ
ḷittāma
m Iruvar
tiruppatiyam
pāṭuvārkku paṅ
ku 4 ṉālu puṟampa
ṭi tirumuṟṟam tiruvala
ku Iṭṭu nirtteḷikka paṅku 1
m paṅkoṉṟu kaṇa
kkap paṅkoṉṟu śrī
kāryyamārāyvāṉukku
p paṅkoṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
